test-case.name: DialogueSystem_AdvanceDialogue_AtLastLine_CompletesDialogue
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue complete - checking for scene transition DialogueSystem: No target scene determined, dialogue ending normally

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_AdvanceDialogue_IncrementsLineIndex
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_002

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_GetCurrentLine_ReturnsCorrectLine
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_HasNextLine_AtLastLine_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_HasNextLine_WithMultipleLines_ReturnsTrue
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_SkipCurrentLine_CallsAdvanceDialogue
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_002

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_StartScene_WithInvalidScene_LogsError
test-case.output: SceneData : sceneId is required DialogueSystem: Scene validation failed for Invalid Scene

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_StartScene_WithNullScene_LogsError
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Cannot start null scene

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_StartScene_WithValidScene_SetsPlayingState
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001

test-case.name: DialogueSystem_StopDialogue_ResetsState
test-case.output: DialogueSystem: Starting scene Test Scene DialogueSystem: Displaying line line_001 DialogueSystem: Dialogue stopped

test-case.name: CanNavigateBack_AtBeginning_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1)

test-case.name: CanNavigateBack_NotAtBeginning_ReturnsTrue
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2)

test-case.name: CanNavigateForward_AfterNavigateBack_ReturnsTrue
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_001' (index: 0)

test-case.name: CanNavigateForward_AtEnd_ReturnsFalse
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2)

test-case.name: Clear_WithEntries_RemovesAllEntries
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_003' at line 0 (total: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: History cleared

test-case.name: GetState_ReturnsCurrentState
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 5 (total: 2)

test-case.name: NavigateBack_AtBeginning_ReturnsNull
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot navigate back (at beginning of history)

test-case.name: NavigateBack_WithHistory_ReturnsPreviousEntry
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 5 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_001' (index: 0)

test-case.name: NavigateForward_AfterNavigateBack_ReturnsNextEntry
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 5 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_001' (index: 0) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated forward to scene 'scene_002' (index: 1)

test-case.name: NavigateForward_AtEnd_ReturnsNull
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot navigate forward (at end of history)

test-case.name: Peek_WithEntries_ReturnsLastEntryWithoutRemoving
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1)

test-case.name: Pop_EmptyHistory_ReturnsNull
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot pop from empty history

test-case.name: Pop_WithEntries_ReturnsAndRemovesLastEntry
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 5 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Popped entry for scene 'scene_002'

test-case.name: Push_AfterNavigateBack_ClearsForwardHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_003' at line 0 (total: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_002' (index: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_001' (index: 0) SceneNavigationHistory: Removed 2 forward entries SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_new' at line 0 (total: 2)

test-case.name: Push_ExceedsMaxSize_RemovesOldestEntries
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_002' at line 0 (total: 2) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_003' at line 0 (total: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Removed 1 oldest entries (max size: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_004' at line 0 (total: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Removed 1 oldest entries (max size: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_005' at line 0 (total: 3) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_004' (index: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Navigated back to scene 'scene_003' (index: 0)

test-case.name: Push_InvalidEntry_DoesNotModifyHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot push invalid entry

test-case.name: Push_NullEntry_DoesNotModifyHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot push invalid entry

test-case.name: Push_ValidEntry_AddsToHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1)

test-case.name: RestoreState_NullState_DoesNotModifyHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: Pushed entry for scene 'scene_001' at line 0 (total: 1) SceneNavigationHistory: Cannot restore invalid state

test-case.name: RestoreState_ValidState_RestoresHistory
test-case.output: SceneNavigationHistory: State restored (2 entries, currentIndex: 0)

test-case.output: CharacterData : characterId is required

test-case.name: CharacterData_WithEmptyCharacterName_ValidateFails
test-case.output: CharacterData : characterName is required

test-case.output: DialogueLineData : lineId is required

test-case.output: Serialized history: {"history":[{"sceneId":"scene_001","dialogueLineIndex":0,"timestamp":639086800678092990},{"sceneId":"scene_002","dialogueLineIndex":5,"timestamp":639086800678093040},{"sceneId":"scene_003","dialogueLineIndex":10,"timestamp":639086800678093070}],"currentIndex":-1,"maxHistorySize":50}
